title: Ice Spice gets slapped by fan during wild McDonald’s fight in Los Angeles
summary_full: Rapper Ice Spice was reportedly slapped by a fan at a Los Angeles McDonald's after an interaction escalated. The incident, which involved a physical altercation and continued outside, has led to conflicting accounts from both Ice Spice's legal team and the fan involved. Police have been notified, and legal action is being considered.
